content.text: Let me investigate each issue in detail.

input.command:
echo "=== rolebinding team-a ==="; kubectl get rolebinding spark-role-binding -n spark-team-a -o yaml 2>&1 | sed -n '1,40p'
echo "=== history pod describe ==="; kubectl describe pod -n spark-history -l app=spark-history-server 2>&1 | tail -20
echo "=== PVCs history ==="; kubectl get pvc -n spark-history 2>&1
echo "=== deployment volumes ==="; kubectl get deployment spark-history-server -n spark-history -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.volumes}' 2>&1; echo
echo "=== env ==="; kubectl get deployment spark-history-server -n spark-history -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.containers[0].env}' 2>&1; echo
echo "=== volumeMounts ==="; kubectl get deployment spark-history-server -n spark-history -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.containers[0].volumeMounts}' 2>&1; echo

content.text: All three bugs confirmed. Let me apply the fixes. I'll preserve the `ui.port` option in the env fix.

input.command:
echo "=== Fix 1: RoleBinding namespace ==="
kubectl patch rolebinding spark-role-binding -n spark-team-a --type=json \
  -p='[{"op": "replace", "path": "/subjects/0/namespace", "value": "spark-team-a"}]' 2>&1

echo "=== Fix 2: PVC reference ==="
kubectl patch deployment spark-history-server -n spark-history --type=json \
  -p='[{"op": "replace", "path": "/spec/template/spec/volumes/0/persistentVolumeClaim/claimName", "value": "spark-history-pvc"}]' 2>&1

echo "=== Fix 3: log directory ==="
kubectl set env deployment/spark-history-server -n spark-history \
  SPARK_HISTORY_OPTS="-Dspark.history.fs.logDirectory=/mnt/spark-logs -Dspark.history.fs.update.interval=5s -Dspark.history.ui.port=18080" 2>&1

content.content:
=== Fix 1: RoleBinding namespace ===
rolebinding.rbac.authorization.k8s.io/spark-role-binding patched
=== Fix 2: PVC reference ===
deployment.apps/spark-history-server patched
=== Fix 3: log directory ===
deployment.apps/spark-history-server env updated

content.text: The PVC just provisioned (WaitForFirstConsumer — it bound once the fixed pod was scheduled). Let me wait for everything to settle and verify the jobs.

input.command:
for i in $(seq 1 30); do
  hs=$(kubectl get pods -n spark-history -l app=spark-history-server --no-headers 2>/dev/null | grep -c Running)
  ja=$(kubectl get job spark-pi-team-a -n spark-team-a -o jsonpath='{.status.succeeded}' 2>/dev/null)
  jb=$(kubectl get job spark-pi-team-b -n spark-team-b -o jsonpath='{.status.succeeded}' 2>/dev/null)
  echo "iter $i: history_running=$hs jobA_succeeded=${ja:-0} jobB_succeeded=${jb:-0}"
  if [ "$hs" = "1" ] && [ "$ja" = "1" ] && [ "$jb" = "1" ]; then echo "ALL GOOD"; break; fi
  sleep 10
done
